history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark, styled hair, wearing a black hoodie with white text and graphics on the back and light grey sweatpants, stands on a metal escalator. The hoodie features a pixelated image and the text "-for a cats and for you". They are wearing white wireless earbuds and appear to be adjusting one. The escalator is moving downwards, with vertical metal slats and yellow safety lines. The background shows a brightly lit, modern indoor space, possibly a mall or airport. In the mid-ground, a person in a blue uniform is mopping the floor with a yellow "wet floor" sign nearby. There are also potted plants, white pillars, glass railings, and other escalators visible. The lighting is bright and even, creating a clean, slightly sterile atmosphere. The overall mood is casual and everyday. The color palette is dominated by cool tones of grey, white, and black, with pops of yellow and blue from the cleaner's uniform and sign.
